playbook.intent: Take an MVP that works on localhost and make it survive paying customers without a co-founder/SRE.
playbook.scope: Take an MVP that works on localhost and make it survive paying customers without a co-founder/SRE. End state: Stripe live, RLS audited, backups proven, legal docs live, support inbox routed.

success-criteria.criterion: Final stage decision-gate is met and committed in writing
Every stage produces its named outputs
Cycle closes only when a written commitment exists for the next step

stage.name: Security audit
stage.intent: Find what a vibe-coded MVP missed.

tasks.task: Run a security-testing checklist against the codebase
Audit RLS / authz on the database
Scan git history for leaked secrets

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when all critical security findings are fixed.

stage.name: Stripe + payment hardening

tasks.task: Wire Stripe live keys with separate webhook secret
Harden webhook validation against replay + spoof

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when test mode + live mode behave identically.

stage.name: Backup + restore drill
stage.intent: Prove you can recover, not assume.
stage.decision-gate: Advance only when restored environment matches prod within tolerance.

stage.name: Secrets + ops cleanup

tasks.task: Move secrets to a managed store
Rotate any leaked or shared keys

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when no plaintext secret is in repo or local file.

stage.name: Support inbox + SLA
stage.intent: Route customer messages somewhere you actually read.

tasks.task: Pick the support inbox tool (email-only is fine)

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when a test ticket reaches you within SLA.

stage.name: Legal docs live
stage.intent: Ship Terms / Privacy / Refund pages before billing.

tasks.task: Draft Terms + Privacy from a solo-saas pack
Add the refund policy + cookie banner

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when checkout shows the policy link.

stage.name: Pre-bill checklist sweep
stage.intent: Final sweep before turning on live billing.

tasks.task: Fire smoke transactions in live mode

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when every checklist item is green.

stage.name: Flip live + monitor
stage.intent: Flip billing live and watch the first 72 hours.
stage.decision-gate: Cycle closes when the first 72 hours pass without a P0 incident.

extra.value: {human: faion get-content pre-launch-hardening-vibe-coded-mvp-safe-to-bill-production --format md, agent: faion get-content pre-launch-hardening-vibe-coded-mvp-safe-to-bill-production --format context, json: faion get-content pre-launch-hardening-vibe-coded-mvp-safe-to-bill-production --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial v2 draft generated from F-059..063 backlog}]
